race.comment: SPANDEX (3) returns from a let-up after struggling in four runs back. Since fitted with the two searching trials and deserves another chance in this easier contest. Like the little reboot heading here and like the race that he finds. Very winnable stuff. STERN DISPUTE (7) is an improving gelding who was a month between runs with a plugging fifth over 1300m at Wyong. Steps up in journey today and brings the right figures to play a leading role in softer company. KEN'KER (2) has been okay in latest couple and goes into the mix.
